channel.title: Zero Trust on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Zero Trust on simeononsecurity

item.title: Tailscale vs Headscale: Complete 2026 Comparison Guide for Self-Hosted VPN
item.category: "VPN" , "Network Security" , "Self-Hosted" , "WireGuard" , "Zero Trust" , "Mesh Networking" , "Open Source" , "Cloud Infrastructure" , "Remote Access" , "Network Management"
item.description: Comprehensive 2026 comparison of Tailscale and Headscale including features, pricing, performance, security, and deployment scenarios to help you choose the best WireGuard-based mesh VPN solution.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): General Security Concepts
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Fundamentals" , "Cryptography" , "PKI" , "Zero Trust" , "Access Control" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Security Controls" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master general security concepts for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn security controls, the CIA triad, change management, cryptography, PKI, and Zero Trust.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Architecture
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Cloud Security" , "Data Protection" , "Resilience" , "Network Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security architecture for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn architecture models, infrastructure security, data protection, and resilience and recovery.

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005): Security Architecture
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Zero Trust" , "Cloud Security" , "Secure SDLC" , "Identity Management" , "PKI" , "CASP+" , "Enterprise Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security architecture for the CompTIA SecurityX CAS-005 exam. Learn resilient system design, secure SDLC, Zero Trust, cloud security, IAM and PKI design, and data security.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Communication and Network Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Network Security" , "Secure Architecture" , "Segmentation" , "Wireless Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "SDN" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Communication and Network Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure network architecture, segmentation, wireless and cellular networks, modern network concepts, and secure channels.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Security Architecture and Engineering
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Security Engineering" , "Cryptography" , "Physical Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Security Models" , "Zero Trust" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Security Architecture and Engineering for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure design principles, security models, cryptographic solutions, cryptanalytic attacks, and physical security.
